blended.narrative: Stevens Pass is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,733 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.4" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 41.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 43" over the past week. Current depth: 74".
